name: faq_shipping_returns_8_pages_faqs

facts.note: A footer subscribe field appears in the rendered markdown below the visible screenshot crop.
The footer subscribe area does not mention a discount or incentive.
No testimonials, ratings, or review snippets are visible on the FAQ page.
The sampled FAQ content does not include product links or catalog CTAs.
The page is informational rather than narrative.

observed_strengths.observation: The FAQ page does answer a concrete shipping question lower on the page.

missing_or_weak.observation: The FAQ opens with tea-history and storage questions instead of leading with shipping, returns, or purchase-objection content.
The FAQ page is a commercial dead end because it does not include product CTAs.

purchase_path_notes: This page answers some objections, but its question order and lack of CTAs make it weak as a pre-purchase support surface.
